top_categories.workout_context: 196 miles. Your legs will beg to quit after 120. This trains the power output you need from mile 130 onward.
Race-pace efforts that mimic Vätternrundan's demands. Pacing, fueling, and tactical decisions under fatigue. Practice the race before June.
Endurance with intensity spikes baked in. Exactly what 4,593ft of climbing on paved Swedish roads around Lake Vättern does to your power file on race day.
196 miles rewards fat oxidation. This volume work shifts your fuel mix so you're still burning fat at hour 5, not bonking at hour 3.
Every hard session works better with a bigger aerobic base. At 196 miles, base fitness is the difference between racing and surviving.
Vätternrundan's paved Swedish roads around Lake Vättern forces constant power changes. Surge over the rough stuff, settle on the smooth, repeat for 196 miles.
When someone attacks on paved Swedish roads around Lake Vättern, you have 10 seconds to respond or you're off the back. This builds that response.
Vätternrundan's paved Swedish roads around Lake Vättern rewards steady threshold power. Surging and recovering costs more watts than just holding.
Tempo is Vätternrundan's race pace. The wattage you'll hold for 196 miles on paved Swedish roads around Lake Vättern. Train it until it's automatic.
88–92% FTP is where you'll spend the hardest sustained miles of Vätternrundan. Train it until it feels boring.
At Vätternrundan, surges push you above threshold and you have to recover while still riding. Over-unders train exactly that.
Short, max efforts are unavoidable. Punchy climbs, gap closures, attacks on paved Swedish roads around Lake Vättern. If you haven't trained them, you'll crack.

race_overlay.nutrition: Ultra-distance fueling for 196 miles: 80–100g carbs/hour from mile 1 — don’t wait until you’re hungry. Practice your exact race-day nutrition in every long training ride. Carry backup calories. 196 miles burns 8,000–12,000+ calories — you cannot replace them all, but you must try.

pack_summary: This 10-workout pack focuses on Durability, Race Simulation, and Blended to prepare you for 196 miles of paved swedish roads around lake vättern in Motala, Östergötland, Sweden.
